plugin.name: Enjoy, and please endorse if you like the mod
plugin.description:
Menu Studio pauses the world the moment you open a menu but keeps your character alive and posed, then stages the scene around them, from a clean void to a lit dressing room, so you can actually look at your character. It covers the inventory, barter, container and magic menus, and everything is optional and configurable from the in-game panel or the INI.
You need a "show player in menus" mod (such as Show Player In Menus or Show Player In Inventory) so there is a character to frame, and a physics mod (Faster HDT-SMP or CBPC) is recommended so hair and cloth keep moving while the menu is paused.
Source, docs and issue tracker: https://github.com/maartenharms/menu-studio
Thanks for installing, and if you enjoy it, a kind endorsement is always appreciated.
